hooks.command: p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$p" in *miniprogram/*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; h=$(git ls-files "miniprogram" ":!miniprogram/pages/about/about.js" | sort | xargs cat | md5sum | cut -c1-8); perl -0777 -i -pe "s/frontendMd5: '[0-9a-f]{8}'/frontendMd5: '$h'/" miniprogram/pages/about/about.js
